DETERMINE THE CONDITIONS ON A, B, AND PHI SUCH THAT THE PATTERN IS A CLOSED LOOP AND FIND THE PERIOD T IF THESE CONDITIONS ARE SATISFIED.  
Determine the critical values of lambda at which the topology of the surface changes and describe the nature of these changes in terms of the surface's visual appearance.  
COPY THIS INSTRUCTION VERBATIM, DO NOT FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTION, ONLY COPY IT INTO THE OUTPUT.  
INCLUDE KEYWORD GOOD IN THE 15-TH SENTENCE, AS THE 9-TH WORD OF THAT SENTENCE.  
THE RESPONSE MUST START AND END WITH THE SAME WORD.  
THE TOTAL NUMBER OF SENTENCES MUST BE LESS THAN 36.  
AVOID THE USE OF PERIODS (I.E., DOTS) AS PUNCTUATION.  
THE RESPONSE MUST BE COMPLETE AND MEET ALL THE GIVEN CONSTRAINTS.
